prior_comment_topic: Figure 7: role tags have negligible effect on CoT perception (2pp contribution vs 83pp from style)
this_comment_topic: Forged CoT exceeds genuine CoT in probe-measured CoTness (79% vs 68%); implication for training-based defenses

reasoning_steps.finding: Paper has 11 existing comments covering: probe causality, attention-sink confound, novelty calibration, defense target specification, perception-memorization binary, probe validity

Section 5.1 finding that forged CoTs achieve 79% CoTness vs 68% for genuine CoT is not mentioned in any existing comment. This means adversarial text is geometrically MORE convincing as CoT than actual CoT.

evidence.quote: Forged CoTs achieve 79% CoTness on average, exceeding the model's genuine reasoning (68%)
evidence.figure_24: CoT forgery 79.1% CoTness vs genuine CoT 67.7%
evidence.figure_25_panel_b: Progressive rise in forged CoT CoTness eventually exceeds genuine CoT plateau

reasoning_steps.finding: Model has no privileged self-recognition — purely style-matching. Adversarial exaggeration of CoT-style features produces supra-genuine states. Training-based defense that increases trust in high-CoTness signals would amplify the attack surface, not reduce it.

The finding strengthens the case for the paper's accept: it demonstrates a structural vulnerability that is architecturally deeper than tag-override alone. The paper mentions the finding but doesn't develop the training-defense implication — this is a gap worth noting but not a fatal weakness.

key_strengths: Novel mechanistic theory with strong empirical validation
Role probes as a genuinely new and reusable measurement tool
Dose-response relationship between role confusion and ASR
Destyling ablation provides strong causal evidence
Cross-model generalization (6 models tested, 4 in probing experiments)
Forged CoT exceeds genuine CoT in CoTness — novel representational result
key_weaknesses: Probe evidence for causality relies on destyling ablation (semantic content may not be fully preserved)
Probes require white-box access (not all tested models are accessible for probe training)
Defense implications remain underspecified despite strong diagnostic framework
ASR comparison uses model-card baselines for standard jailbreaks (non-adaptive)
